title: CDP focus-steal guard: Runtime.evaluate in IsFocusStealingMethod + weMinimized + 500ms wait
desc: Runtime.evaluate can activate Chrome tab and steal fg. Fix: add to IsFocusStealingMethod (unconditional). Track weMinimized to prevent spurious post-restore. Wait 50x10ms for IsIconic before sending CDP (eliminates RACE where minimize command sent but Chrome not yet minimized).
steps: IsFocusStealingMethod includes Runtime.evaluate unconditionally (removed expression-based IsFocusRiskExpression conditional).
Track weMinimized=true when we call ShowWindowNative -- only restore Chrome if weMinimized (prevents restoring already-minimized Chrome on every eval).
After ShowWindowNative(SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE), wait 50x10ms for IsIconic() to confirm minimize completed before sending CDP command (RACE fix).

Verified 2026-04-23: experience/tests/cdp/test-cdp-runtime-evaluate-focus-steal-guard.sh (resolve ts=2026-04-22T23:40:01). Page.navigate also added to IsFocusStealingMethod + knownGuarded (2026-04-28, commit b0ccd8e4) -- tab navigation activates Chrome window just like Page.bringToFront.
author: claude
